title: Pudgy Penguins Expands Retail Footprint with Target Trading Card Rollout
summary: Pudgy Penguins, the NFT-born franchise, is expanding into physical retail with its Vibes Series 3 trading cards now available at Target stores across the US. This marks a significant move for the brand as it bridges the gap between digital collectibles and mainstream commerce.
body:
Pudgy Penguins, an NFT-born franchise, is making a bold move into the physical retail space. The brand has launched its Vibes Series 3 trading cards at Target stores nationwide, marking a significant expansion beyond the digital realm. This rollout brings Pudgy Penguins products to a broader audience through a major retailer.

The Vibes Series 3 trading cards feature unique designs and are part of Pudgy Penguins' ongoing effort to merge digital collectibles with physical merchandise. Each card is inspired by the brand's digital NFTs, offering a tangible piece of the Pudgy Penguins universe. The cards are now available at Target locations across the United States, making them accessible to a wider audience beyond the crypto community.

This move is significant for everyday consumers as it brings the Pudgy Penguins brand into mainstream retail, making it easier for non-crypto enthusiasts to engage with the brand. It also represents a broader trend in the NFT space, where digital projects are increasingly seeking to establish a presence in the physical world. This could pave the way for other NFT projects to follow suit, blending digital and physical collectibles.

For those interested in collecting Pudgy Penguins trading cards, now is the time to visit Target stores. Keep an eye out for any future expansions or collaborations from the brand, as Pudgy Penguins continues to innovate in both digital and physical spaces. This rollout is a clear indicator of the growing acceptance and integration of NFT-derived products in mainstream retail.
twitterThread: Pudgy Penguins, the NFT-born franchise, is now in Target stores across the US with its Vibes Series 3 trading cards. A big step for digital collectibles into mainstream retail.
The cards feature unique designs inspired by the brand's NFTs, making them a tangible piece of the Pudgy Penguins universe. Available nationwide at Target.

If you're into collectibles or just curious, check out the cards at your local Target. This could be the start of more NFT brands going physical. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-20-pudgy-penguins-brings-nft-brand-to-target-stores-with-new-trading-cards
